handoff.reason: Validated populate output shows CodeRef IDs and semantic registry projection work, but relationship fields and source-header projection need a targeted follow-up implementation.

execution_rules.phase_gate: Complete each phase, run its validation, then update communication.json before advancing.
execution_rules.hard_stop_policy: Hard stops are recorded at every phase boundary because the previous workorder's focused tests missed real populate output gaps.

hard_constraints: semantic-registry.json remains a projection from canonical ElementData.
Source headers remain optional and off by default.
Default populate must not modify source files.
Path outputs and CodeRef IDs remain relative POSIX-style paths.

decisions_log.decision: Create a follow-up phased workorder after validating the root cause instead of patching ad hoc.
decisions_log.reason: The issue spans public output contracts and needs explicit verification gates.

phase_transitions.summary: Root cause reconfirmed: extracted imports existed for graph construction but were absent from generator-visible PipelineState/ElementData.
PipelineState now exposes imports/calls and semantic ElementData enrichment attaches normalized file-level imports.
Index and semantic-registry generation now share buildSemanticElementsFromState().
Source headers now write one deduplicated semantic block per file, preserve blank spacing after leading comments, and avoid CRLF malformed adjacency.

communication_log.summary: Created phased workorder to fix populate semantic relationship propagation and optional source-header projection after root cause validation.
Registered workorder, session, and active-work entries in ASSISTANT/TRACKING. Canonical register-active-work.js failed because it uses require() under ESM; direct view-file registration was used.
Pre-execution semantic validation passed: critical=0, warning=1, info=0, rag_status=success.

Implemented semantic relationship propagation and file-level source-header repair. Build passed, focused tests passed 26/26, and final clean clone C:\tmp\coderef-core-populate-semantic-verify-20260501-134310 produced 2053 elements with imports and 1486 with usedBy; semantic-registry mirrored index with zero relationship mismatches.
Ran foundation-docs generators and validate-docs.js. Validator exited 0 with warnings for 3 pre-existing invalid UUID anchors.
doc-discovery.mjs returned no candidates; manual review found docs/CLI.md and README.md already describe semantic-registry projection and opt-in source headers.

Wrote .coderef/sessions/SES-2026-05-01-POPULATE-SEMANTIC-RELATIONSHIPS-HEADERS.yaml. Repo-local migrate script was absent; canonical ASSISTANT migrate script ran successfully but does not include CODEREF-CORE as a source.
